feature.name: Python package requirement, marker, specifier, and version semantics
feature.description: Extract packaging's core PEP 440 and PEP 508 parsing/evaluation behavior as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: parse, normalize, compare, hash, and stringify PEP 440 versions including epochs, post releases, pre releases, dev releases, and local versions
parse and evaluate specifier sets including compatible release, equality wildcard, exclusion, prerelease handling, filtering, and containment
parse PEP 508 requirements with extras, URL requirements, specifiers, and environment markers
parse and evaluate environment markers with and/or grouping, in/not in operators, extra handling, and default environment values
raise stable InvalidVersion, InvalidSpecifier, InvalidRequirement, and InvalidMarker errors for malformed input
excluded_behaviors: wheel tag generation and compatibility tags
filename and sdist/wheel utility helpers outside the required entrypoints
original project tests, documentation, and release tooling

entanglement.description: PEP requirement behavior combines grammar parsing, specifier/version models, marker evaluation, and error classes.

output.import: from featurelifted import Version, SpecifierSet, Requirement, Marker, default_environment
